name: jesse-agent
description: A personal AI agent built from scratch in TypeScript. No frameworks, no SDK — a hand-written agentic loop, learned by reverse-engineering Claude Code.
//type: ESM module system (chosen over CommonJS). Lets us write `import ... from './x.js'`, use top-level await, and matches Claude Code's source + a future web target.
//scripts: dev runs TS directly via tsx (no build step, fast feedback while learning). build/start are for later when we ship compiled JS.
//engines: Node 20.6+ required: that's when Node gained stable built-in .env loading and mature ESM support. We're on v22.
//devDependencies: ZERO runtime deps by design — the agent core uses only Node built-ins (fetch, readline). These three are dev-only tooling: the TS compiler, the TS runner, and Node's type definitions.
